# dashcraft

> Headless React dashboard library with boolean API, drag-and-drop, resizable widgets, and AI-native tooling.

## Overview

dashcraft (`@dashcraft/core`) is an MIT-licensed React library for building admin panels, analytics dashboards, and internal tools. It handles layout, drag-and-drop, resizing, persistence, and widget state — you bring your own styles.

## Quick Install

```bash
npm install @dashcraft/core
# Optional chart peer deps
npm install recharts
npm install @nivo/core @nivo/bar @nivo/line @nivo/pie
```

## Core Concepts

The API is intentionally minimal. Every interactive behaviour is a boolean prop on `DashboardCard`:

```tsx
import { Dashboard, DashboardCard, KPIWidget, RechartsWidget } from '@dashcraft/core'
import '@dashcraft/core/styles.css'

export function MyDashboard() {
  return (
    <Dashboard id="main" persist="main-v1">
      <DashboardCard id="revenue" drag resize settings delete>
        <KPIWidget title="Revenue" value={124500} format="currency" />
      </DashboardCard>
      <DashboardCard id="sales-chart" drag resize settings>
        <RechartsWidget
          chartType="bar"
          data={salesData}
          series={[{ key: 'value', name: 'Sales', color: '#6366f1' }]}
          xAxisKey="month"
        />
      </DashboardCard>
    </Dashboard>
  )
}
```

## Components

### `<Dashboard>`
Root layout container.

| Prop | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | Unique dashboard identifier |
| `persist` | `string` | localStorage key for layout persistence |
| `columns` | `number` | Grid columns (default: 12) |
| `rowHeight` | `number` | Row height in px (default: 60) |
| `editMode` | `boolean` | Enable/disable edit mode |
| `onLayoutChange` | `(layout) => void` | Layout change callback |

### `<DashboardCard>`
Widget wrapper with behaviour props.

| Prop | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | Unique card identifier |
| `drag` | `boolean` | Enable drag-and-drop |
| `resize` | `boolean` | Enable resize handles |
| `settings` | `boolean` | Show settings button |
| `delete` | `boolean` | Show delete button |
| `responsive` | `boolean` | Responsive breakpoint support |
| `style` | `CSSProperties` | Grid positioning via `gridColumn` / `gridRow` |

### `<KPIWidget>`
Metric card with trend indicators.

| Prop | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `title` | `string` | Widget title |
| `value` | `number` | Current metric value |
| `format` | `"currency" \| "percent" \| "number"` | Value formatting |
| `previousValue` | `number` | Previous period value (shows trend) |
| `prefix` | `string` | Value prefix |
| `suffix` | `string` | Value suffix |

### `<RechartsWidget>`
Chart widget backed by recharts.

| Prop | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `chartType` | `"bar" \| "line" \| "area" \| "pie" \| "scatter" \| "radar"` | Chart type |
| `data` | `object[]` | Chart data array |
| `series` | `SeriesConfig[]` | Data series with key, name, color |
| `xAxisKey` | `string` | Key for X-axis values |
| `title` | `string` | Widget title |

### `<NivoWidget>`
Chart widget backed by @nivo.

| Prop | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `chartType` | `"heatmap" \| "treemap" \| "sunburst"` | Chart type |
| `data` | `object[]` | Nivo-compatible data |
| `title` | `string` | Widget title |
| `colorScheme` | `string` | Nivo color scheme |

## Hooks

- `useDashboard(id)` — Access dashboard state and edit mode
- `useWidgetData(id)` — Subscribe to widget data updates
- `useWidgetEvents(id)` — Subscribe to widget interaction events
- `usePersistence(key)` — Manual layout persistence control
- `useDraggable(id)` — Raw drag state for custom widgets
- `useResize(id)` — Raw resize state for custom widgets

## MCP Server

For AI-assisted dashboard generation, use `@dashcraft/mcp-codegen`:

```bash
npm install -g @dashcraft/mcp-codegen
```

Tools available:
- `analyze_dashboard` — Analyze a screenshot and map widgets to @dashcraft/core components
- `generate_code` — Generate TSX code from widget configuration
- `generate_project` — Generate a complete Vite project as a base64 zip
